title: cabins
description: cabins, it adds cabins to your world. so when night hits no mater where you are you can always find a place to eat, sleep, stay! plus you have a room mate to gear up with the food and tools you can "borrow" from his chests!
body:
- what does this mod add?


  cabins! it adds cabin with diffrent loot and armor dpending on wich biome you are in.


- what types cabins does it add?


  oak, cherry, dark oak, jungle, mangrove, desart, badlands, brick, bamboo, for every biome theres a cabin.



- why should i download the cabins mod?
 


- it adds cabins, great for food, sleep, a place to live. plus the cabins all over the place, ALSO the cabins are in every biome and there will allways be a cabin close to the player when they make a world so all the cabin spawn close to the player making every biome no to far from spawn, and they give you pretty good loot too!



 - what mobs does it add? 


   camper.



- do i need anything to run this?


  no! its just a simple yet outstandshing mod that makes very little feel like a alot!


- is this mod compatable with other mods?


  yes its fine to work any other mod and you dont need gekolib to run it and it doesn't lag you at all!
